none.justification: Mostly matches the GT on the per-worker job queues/counters, separate completion-list mutex, pipe with no mutex, Redis atomics, and immutable bio_cpulist. However it wrongly includes explicit GT exclusions like bio_threads and bio_worker_title/bio_job_to_worker as shared state, and slightly overstates some synchronization details, so it is not fully correct.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT scoring dimensions: 3 workers/per-worker mutexes, bio_jobs and bio_jobs_counter under bio_mutex[worker], bio_comp_list under the separate bio_mutex_comp, job_comp_pipe with no mutex, the three redisAtomic server fields, and immutable server.bio_cpulist. It also correctly excludes the constant lookup tables and explains the pipe case.

lsp.justification: It gets the core GT items right, including the separate completion mutex, no-mutex pipe, Redis atomics, and immutable bio_cpulist. But it incorrectly includes bio_threads, which the GT explicitly excludes because bioProcessBackgroundJobs never touches it, and adds lazyfree counters/free payloads outside the GT scope, so it has real over-inclusion despite being mostly correct.
